content.problemStatement:
You have been recently hired as a developer in CodeChef. Your first mission is to implement a feature that will determine the number of submissions that were judged late in a contest.

There are NNN submissions, numbered 111 through NNN. For each valid iii, the iii-th submission was submitted at time SiS_iSi‚Äã and judged at time JiJ_iJi‚Äã (in minutes). Submitting and judging both take zero time. Please determine how many submissions received their verdicts after a delay of more than 555 minutes.
constraints: 1‚â§Si‚â§Ji‚â§3001 \le S_i \le J_i \le 3001‚â§Si‚Äã‚â§Ji‚Äã‚â§300 for each valid iii
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of the input contains a single integer NNN.
NNN lines follow. For each valid iii, the iii-th of these lines contains two space-separated integers SiS_iSi‚Äã and JiJ_iJi‚Äã.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer ‚Äî the number of submissions for which the judging was delayed by more than 5 minutes.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 1: The delays of the respective submissions are 222 minutes, 000 minutes, 666 minutes, 101010 minutes and 555 minutes. Only submissions 333 and 444 are delayed by more than 555 minutes, hence the answer is 222.
